{{CargoRelic
|name=Vermilion Pot
|class_id=20923
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Vermilion was originally a divine bird who guards the world. By chance, it encountered the Master Chef and tasted his personally made dishes. It felt that a great bird's life should be accompanied by delicious food, so it transformed into a pot, allowing it to taste the freshest dishes...
|fame=30
|art=15
|fth=15
|civ=15
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail DEF +20<br>At the Culinary Shop, Daily Supply Deal +1
|ss2=Snail DEF +40<br>At the Culinary Shop, Daily Supply Deal +2
|ss3=Snail DEF +60<br>At the Culinary Shop, Daily Supply Deal +3
|ss4=Snail DEF +60<br>At the Culinary Shop, Daily Supply Deal +3
|ss7=Snail DEF +60<br>At the Culinary Shop, Daily Supply Deal +3<br> (Awakened)
}}
